margin_product.reason: Margin Trading is documented as WIP and requires API stability, eligibility, parsers, lifecycle, and reconciliation before runtime.

contract_product.reason: The current official/API profile does not expose standard futures, perpetual, or options contracts.

official_sources.evidence: Bitso documents Margin Trading as a WIP product surface; it is not wired into this spot adapter's runtime.

runtime_isolation: Do not route Bitso Margin Trading through spot order/account runtime until the WIP product has an audited account eligibility guard, margin metadata, signed readbacks, private order lifecycle, parser fixtures, and reconciliation.
required_audit_gaps: margin product availability and region/account eligibility
margin collateral, balance, position, and risk parser fixtures
margin order lifecycle request specs and error taxonomy
post-write readback/reconciliation and live dry-run gate
